sglang.title: fix(rpc) Synchronize RPC requests only within the TP group.
sglang.author: twb1235
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
As discussed in issue #24687, there is a conflict between handle_rpc_request() and Pipeline Parallelism (PP) that causes a deadlock.
Root Cause:
When PP rank 0 receives an RPC request, the following sequence leads to a deadlock:
PP rank 0: recv_requests() → receives RPC request
PP rank 0:

sglang.title: Fix SM120 NVFP4 KV cache test OOM
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

move the SM120 Llama NVFP4 KV-cache test from models_e2e to quant
use GSM8KMixin with DefaultServerBase for one server configuration instead of sweeping through run_combined_tests
keep the test registered in extra-a on the 1-gpu-small runner
lower mem_fraction_static from the default 0.885

sglang.title: perf: avoid excessive prefill CUDA graph padding
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Prefill CUDA graphs replay at the next captured token bucket. When capture buckets are sparse, that can execute far more model work than the request contains and make graph replay slower than an exact-shape eager forward.
This change falls back to eager when the selected capture bucket is mo

sglang.title: Implement SM120 DeepSeek V4 flashinfer_mxfp4 moe runner backend + TP2
sglang.author: lucifer1004
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
DeepSeek-V4-Flash (FP8 checkpoint, MXFP4 experts) could not be served on SM120 (Blackwell desktop/workstation, e.g. RTX PRO 6000). The failures encountered while bringing up TP2/TP4 on 2–4 GPUs were:

The first MoE forward crashed because Marlin dereferenced masked -1 expert blocks under

sglang.title: CI: synchronize prefill graph test fixtures
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Synchronize the lightweight PrefillCudaGraphRunner test fixtures with the state now read by can_run_graph():

initialize capture_num_tokens in the multimodal piecewise CUDA graph fixture;
initialize prefill_backend_name and has_mha_companion_layers in the prefill-padding fixture.

sglang.title: [VLM] Batch cross-request ViT encoding and reuse attention metadata
sglang.author: Alisehen
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR follows up on and references #22132.
In chunked prefill, multimodal embedding preparation can process multiple VLM requests in the same scheduler batch. Before this change, _get_chunked_prefill_embedding() handled cache-miss images request by request, which could call the ViT enco

sglang.title: [Kernel] Sweep decoupled scattered kernels into sglang.kernels.ops (RFC #29630)
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Continues the RFC #29630 scattered-kernel sweep. This PR moves the kernels that are genuinely decoupled (no srt runtime-type dependency) into sglang.kernels.ops.*, byte-identically, following the Phase 2.5 recipe (move + KernelSpec registration + in-tree import rewrites only).
Moved (byte-id

sglang.title: [NPU] fix: skip Triton embedding kernel on NPU to avoid kernel launch failure
sglang.author: chx96642264
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
PR #30948 introduced a fused Triton kernel. However, on NPU devices, it will pass all checks and attempt to launch the Triton kernel on NPU, and it will get a kernel launch failure:

Modifications
Add an _is_npu guard at the top of _use_triton_embedding .
This restores the pre-#30948 beha

sglang.title: Reset only the used mamba state on unified radix cache
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
On a prefix cache hit, MambaComponent inherits the base whole-chain LRU refresh (reset_node_and_parents_mru), even though a match only consumes the single state at best_match_node — the one that gets COW'd (finalize_match_result), and the only node inc_lock_ref locks. Keeping every ancest

sglang.title: [NPU] FIX garbled characters illusion problems, in prefix cache mtp scenarios.
sglang.author: McZyWu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
For NPU, when the input and output reach tens of thousands of tokens, enabling radix cache in MTP scenarios can occasionally cause the illusion of garbled characters. Opening images or using PlanStream will exacerbate this issue.
When close radix cache, the above hallucination problem wil

sglang.title: Reset only the used mamba state on radix cache hit
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
On a prefix cache hit, MambaRadixCache refreshes the entire matched path to most-recently-used (reset_node_and_parents_mru), even though a match only consumes the single state at the branch node — the one that gets COW'd, and the only node inc_lock_ref locks. Keeping every ancestor hot cl

sglang.title: metrics: allow extra labels on HTTP request/response Prometheus metrics
sglang.author: sshleifer
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Add an optional extra_labels: Optional[Dict[str, str]] parameter to add_prometheus_track_response_middleware that is merged into the label set of the sglang:http_requests_total / http_responses_total / http_requests_active metrics (and their inc/dec calls). This lets a deployment attach identifying

sglang.title: model_runner: extract post-memory-pool wiring into _init_post_memory
sglang.author: sshleifer
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Split the post-pool component setup (canary install, ngram embedding manager, hisparse coordinator, routed-experts / indexer capturers, graph_shared_output) out of ModelRunner.alloc_memory_pool into a _init_post_memory_pool_components() method that alloc_memory_pool calls at the end. Pure refactor,

sglang.title: [Fix] Respect cache_protected_len in ChunkCache and disabled-radix release paths
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
The radix-enabled release path already frees from cache_protected_len; make the ChunkCache and disabled-radix paths honor the same ownership semantics (no behavior change today -- the field is always 0 on these paths).


CI States
Latest PR Test (Base): 🚫 Run #29656705974
Latest PR Test (Extra): ❌ R

sglang.title: [flashinfer] Pass window_left at plan time for the SWA paged prefill wrapper
sglang.author: luccafong
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
What
sglang's FlashInfer backend plans the sliding-window paged prefill wrapper without window_left, so flashinfer selects the fa2 module with use_sliding_window=False — the per-element left-window mask is compiled out. The window_left passed later at forward() silently overwrites flashinfer's plan/

sglang.title: [Scheduler] Move the WAR barrier to right after each `run_batch` launch
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Move _apply_war_barrier from the event-loop top to right after each run_batch launch, in the normal overlap loop and both PD-disaggregation loops

Background

The loop-top barrier only ordered the next iteration's schedule-stream writes behind the previous forward's shared-buffer reads
Resu

sglang.title: [DSA] Integrate Q8KV8 FP8 Sparse MLA Prefill into the DSA Backend (DeepSeek-V3.2)
sglang.author: JackChuang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR integrates the SM90 Q8KV8 FP8 sparse-MLA prefill kernel from PR-1 (#25751) into SGLang's DSA prefill backend (dsa_backend.py), so DeepSeek-V3.2 serving runs native FP8 query × FP8 KV sparse attention during prefill end-to-end. It is opt-in via --dsa-prefill-backend flashmla_sparse_q8

sglang.title: fix(gemma4): prevent attention mask offset overflow
sglang.author: kflansburg
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Gemma 4 builds one flattened dense attention mask per request and stores cumulative mask offsets in an int32 tensor. A sufficiently large multimodal request can contribute more than 2^31 mask elements. If another request follows it in the same prefill batch, that later request consumes a

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Re-sync parameter tp_rank after process_weights_after_loading (fix replicated / disable_tp weight reload)
vllm.author: alexxu-roblox
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Weight reload can crash for replicated (disable_tp=True) parameters such as the DeepSeek-V2/V3 / GLM MLA fused a-projection (q_a_proj + kv_a_proj_with_mqa when q_lora_rank > 0).
BasevLLMParameter.__init__ stamps self.tp_rank with the global rank. It is reconciled to the layer's tp_rank (0 fo

vllm.title: Remove even more unnecessary `load_weights` methods

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Aside from deleting boilerplate, the new things in this PR are:

Extract and deduplicate weight filters used by many models:

maybe_fuse_shared_experts - the same code was repeated in several models for enabling the AITER fused-shared-experts optimisation
get_spec_layer_idx_from_weight_name/skip_spe

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Bump tml-fa4 for cutlass-dsl 4.6 API compatibility
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Bump tml-fa4 to include the cutlass-dsl 4.6 CuTe API migration (vllm-project/tml-fa4#3) so Inkling Blackwell attention imports cleanly.

Move Entrypoints Unit Tests, Entrypoints Integration (LLM), and Entrypoints Integration (Responses API) from the implicit gpu_1_queue path to the h200_35gb MIG queue.
Make the basic parser-context smoke request a concise answer so Qwen3 does not exhaust the 6,000-token test context while so

vllm.title: [ROCm][DSv3.2][Perf] Cap sparse MLA decode KV-splits with a work-per-split heuristic
vllm.author: frida-andersson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
[ROCm][DSv3.2][Perf] Cap sparse MLA decode KV-splits with a work-per-split heuristic
The ROCm aiter sparse-MLA decode backend calls get_mla_metadata_v1 without max_split_per_batch, so aiter defaults to -1 and splits the decode reduction across every CU (304 on gfx942). The reduce only covers the sel

Purpose
Follow up to #40912.
When --enable-prompt-tokens-details is toggled, compute the number of prompt tokens written to prefix cache and pass it through to OpenAI Chat Completions and eventually to Anthropic Messages API. Ensures num_cache_creation_tokens is populated.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Qwen3-VL/Qwen-Omni: honor max_pixels/min_pixels for video prompts
vllm.author: lishunyang12
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #48733.
Problem
For Qwen3-VL and the Qwen-Omni thinkers (Qwen2.5-Omni, Qwen3-Omni), video mm_processor_kwargs={"max_pixels": ...} (and min_pixels) is silently dropped, so the prompt uses the uncapped native resolution and prompt_tokens are inflated.
Two things combine:

HF video processors rea

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Ensure sliding window tests release GPU memory
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Use vllm_runner in the sliding-window correctness test to explicitly shut down the engine and wait for GPU memory to settle between parameterized cases. This prevents the next test from failing its startup memory check while the previous engine is still releasing VRAM. Motivation:

vllm.title: [Core] Add MRV2 virtual-batch PCP for MLA
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Adds an MRV2 virtual-batch implementation for prefill context parallelism (PCP), initially targeting MLA and sparse MLA.

Add a stateful PCPManager that partitions the globally scheduled MRV2 InputBatch into rank-local virtual rows while preserving global request state for restore, logits, a
